type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increase in emissions of substance is mainly attributable to an increase in the estimated particulate matter generated from wind erosion. The EC monitoring station at Chatham-Kent was not in operation after 2011, so wind data was used from the next closest station, Windsor. There was also a higher volume of vehicular traffic on unpaved roads.

comments.comment: Ridge Landfill is an open landfill, therefore, more waste is added to the landfill each year.  The increased waste volume produces an increased amount of landfill gas.  Since VOCs are a component of landfill gas, this results in an increased VOC release.
